title: Mistral新巨型猫模型引热议
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "The le chaton fat meme is leaking to the outside world and I expect to be asked about Mistral's new ginormous cat model with infinite benchmark scores at my next meeting with corporate leaders.
I guess it is better than being asked about the "MIT pilot AI study."" / X
